description: Radio atom built on @radix-ui/react-radio-group. Renders a single circular indicator (ring + filled dot) as one option within a RadioGroup. Atom-only — no internal label.
_classification_note: Two-file compound: <RadioGroup> wraps RadixRadioGroup.Root, <Radio> wraps RadixRadioGroup.Item. Size is propagated via RadioGroupContext but Radio may override per-instance.

library.name: @radix-ui/react-radio-group
library.rationale: Provides roving tabindex, arrow-key navigation, role=radiogroup/radio, aria-checked, hidden form input — all WAI-ARIA APG compliant. Consistent with the project's existing Radix usage (Switch, Tooltip, Tabs, etc.). data-state attributes drive our token-based Tailwind selectors.

size.description: Visual size propagated to all child Radios via context. Individual Radio may override.

disabled.description: Disables all radios in the group.

name.description: Form integration — name of the hidden input.

required.description: Form validation — a value must be selected to submit.

size.description: Override size from group context. @see RADIO_SIZES

id.description: Element id — pair with external <label htmlFor>.

className.description: Additional Tailwind classes merged with cn().

omittedFromBase.asChild: Radio is a leaf control — asChild adds zero value.

size._comment: Visual circle dimensions — also the SVG viewBox render box. Hit target is fixed-inset 8px on all sizes (matches Checkbox).

tokens._comment: All --comp-radio-* tokens. Sizing in :root, colors in [data-theme]. The SVG path is the source of truth for ring thickness and inner-dot size — no separate dot/border tokens.

focus-visible.implementation: absolute span, 2px border --comp-radio-focus-border, opacity-0 → group-focus-visible:opacity-100, sized to visual circle (NOT hit area)

hitAreaStrategy.approach: padding + negative margin on the focusable RadixRadioGroup.Item: p-[var(--comp-radio-inset)] -m-[var(--comp-radio-inset)]
hitAreaStrategy.rationale: Fixed 8px inset matches the parallel Checkbox component for consistency. The visual circle and layout box stay at the Figma-spec size; only the click/touch area is enlarged. Resulting hit areas: xs 32×32, sm 36×36, md 40×40.
hitAreaStrategy.focusRing: Bound to the visual circle (-inset-0.5), not the expanded hit area.

implementation.pattern: Record maps + cn() (NOT CVA — matches Switch/Checkbox). The SVG path is the single source of truth for ring thickness and inner-dot size.
structure: Radio → RadixRadioGroup.Item (the group, owns the foreground color cascade via text-* classes)
└ <span> focus ring — absolute -inset-0.5, 2px border, opacity-0 → group-focus-visible:opacity-100

transitions.fgColor: transition-colors duration-fast ease-enter (on the Root, cascades to SVG via currentColor)

labelStrategy.composition: External <label htmlFor={id}> wraps the radio, or compose with future FormField
